chain.thought: Explanation: Count the tracks where the "featured guest(s)" column is filled (rows 4, 5, 6, 10, 13, 16), totaling 6 tracks with featured artists. There are 17 tracks in total, so the remaining 11 tracks do not feature any artist.

judge_thought:
Explanation: The question asks for the number of tracks that feature a guest artist versus those that do not. From the "featured guest(s)" column:
Featured: rows 4 (cj mac), 5 (ice cube), 6 (e-40 & too short), 10 (ice cube, daz dillinger & cj mac), 13 (mack 10 & ice cube), 16 (ron banks) — total 6.
Not featured: the remaining 11 tracks (rows 1, 2, 3, 7, 8, 9, 11, 12, 14, 15, 17) — total 11.
Thus, the counts are 6|11, matching the Prediction Answer.
